name: Primary Dark
usage: Backgrounds, headers, logo on light backgrounds, body text on cream/white, cover dark bar, card backgrounds
never_use_with: Teal text on dark — low contrast. Never pair dark-on-dark.

name: Teal
usage: Accent bars, highlights, dividers, footer rules, links, callout text, badge backgrounds, stat callout numbers, header bar backgrounds
never_use_with: Dark backgrounds for text (low contrast). Never use teal text on teal background. Never use as full-page background.

name: Cream
usage: Page backgrounds, light section backgrounds, breathing space between sections
never_use_with: Dark gray text directly on cream without sufficient contrast. Never use cream text on white.

name: White
usage: Text on dark backgrounds, text on teal backgrounds, card text on dark/teal cards, logo on dark backgrounds
never_use_with: Never use white text on cream — insufficient contrast. Never use white as a primary accent color.

name: Dark Gray
usage: Body text on cream/white backgrounds, caption text, supporting copy
never_use_with: Never use on dark backgrounds. Never use for headlines — headlines use #090C0B or #FFFFFF only.

name: Light Gray
usage: Divider lines, subtle borders, inactive UI states, separators
never_use_with: Never use as text color — too low contrast. Never use as background — use cream #FAF8F4 instead.

name: RETIRED Gold
usage: NEVER USE — retired from palette. Replace all instances with teal #00B7CE or white #FFFFFF.
never_use_with: Everything. This color is banned from all GRM materials.

name: BANNED Forest Green
usage: NEVER USE — not part of GRM palette.
never_use_with: Everything. No shade of green is approved for GRM.
